description: A spot-inspection by OSHA has resulted in a mandatory incident report that must be logged into the HRMS immediately. Read the report located at ~/Desktop/osha_inspection_report.txt. In Sentrifugo, create two new Disciplinary Incident/Action Types named 'OSHA Violation - Minor' and 'OSHA Violation - Critical'. Log the incidents from the report against Christopher Lee (EMP014) using the 'OSHA Violation - Minor' type and Andrew Thomas (EMP017) using the 'OSHA Violation - Critical' type, including the exact descriptions provided in the report.
